cmd.app_tour: Kwaḷọk tok ko ilo app eo
cmd.app_tour_done: Ej jino tūr eo — kōjerbal Tokālik ñan etetal ilọk.
cmd.app_tour_hint: Juon tūr ej tōl kōn men ko reḷap
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Kōṃṃan kile ilo kōnono eo ñan jeorḷọk uwaak ko aṃ.
cmd.clear_my_answers_hint: Kōjepḷaak uwaak ko aṃ ilo jerbal in
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Ej jeorḷọk men ko ijin im bwebwenato eo — ej kajjitōk ṃokta
cmd.create_lesson: Kōṃṃan juon katak (kwaḷọk tok un eo)
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot enaaj tōl jerbal ko tokālik.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Ej jino katak eo me ej tōl — AlloBot enaaj kajjitōk un eo aṃ.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Ej jino jerbal eo me ej tōl — ba juon un im kūrейd
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Ukōt māāṇāṇ, sepia, marok, eṃṃan-ñan-dyslexia, im bar jet
cmd.export_pack_done: Ej kōppopo daunlot in pakij in katak…
cmd.export_pack_hint: Daunlot katak eo āinwōt juon file ej make ālik
cmd.font_bigger: Kōṃṃan bwe leta ko ren ḷapḷọk
cmd.font_reset_done: Joñan leta emōj kōjepḷaak ñan kar joñan eo.
cmd.font_smaller: Kōṃṃan bwe leta ko ren dikḷọk
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Kōṃṃan juon etale in kein ko ilo men ko ijin
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Kōṃṃan juon glossary jān men ko ijin
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Kōṃṃan juon outline jān men ko ijin
cmd.generate_quiz_done: Ej kōṃṃan juon quiz jān men ko ijin…
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Kōṃṃan juon quiz jān men ko ijin
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_hint: Kōṃṃan sentence frame ko jān men ko ijin
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Kōṃṃan juon joñan riit epidodoḷọk — ba “ñan kūrейd N” ñan juon mejānkajjik
cmd.go_dashboard_hint: Jepḷaak ñan jejaak in katak eo eḷap
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Katak kōn glossary in āinwōt juon deck in flashcard
cmd.open_allohaven_hint: Juon jikin ej aenōṃṃan im kōllaajrak
cmd.open_class_session_done: Kōnono in session in kilaaj emōj kapeḷḷọk.
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Jino ak deḷọñ ilo juon session in kilaaj ej mour
cmd.open_community_catalog_hint: Lale katak ko an jukjuk im pād me eṃōj jaake
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Kalōk im daunlot peba ko reoktak
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Educator Hub emōj kapeḷḷọk — kaat in Document Pipeline epād epaake jabl.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Kein jerbal in katak + kaat in Document Pipeline
cmd.open_learning_hub_hint: Ikkure, kāmmijbar, im kein katak ko
cmd.open_lumen_done: Lumen emōj kapeḷḷọk ilo STEM Lab.
cmd.open_lumen_hint: Ukōt data in assessment ñan chart ko
cmd.open_notebook: Kapeḷḷọk bok in jeje eo aō
cmd.open_notebook_hint: Jeje ko im men ko eṃōj kōjparoki
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Interview juon persona in AI kōn un in
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: AI, dictation, im Socratic gating ñan kajjojo project
cmd.open_roster_hint: Kōllaajrak kumi in kilaaj ko aṃ
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Kein jerbal in science & math me rekōṃṃakūt
cmd.open_storyforge_hint: Jeje in kōṃṃan bwebwenato me ej tōl
cmd.open_study_timer_hint: Juon timer in lukkuun ḷōmṇak / kakkije
cmd.open_submission_inbox: Kapeḷḷọk inbox in jerbal eṃōj jilkinḷọk
cmd.open_submission_inbox_done: Inbox in jerbal eṃōj jilkinḷọk emōj kapeḷḷọk.
cmd.open_submission_inbox_hint: Etale jerbal ko ri-jikuuḷ raar jilkinḷọk
cmd.open_symbol_studio_hint: Bọọd in AAC & jipañ ko rej alikkar
cmd.open_text_settings_hint: Font, kōtaan, im kōḷọk in kōḷowaan
cmd.open_translate_done: Kōnono in ukōt naan emōj kapeḷḷọk.
cmd.open_translate_hint: Ukōt men ko ijin ñan bar juon kajin
cmd.pipeline_downloads: Etal ñan daunlot ko an pipeline
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Jaak in Daunlot ko — PDF eo eṃōj tag-e ej kọọp eo epojak ñan jaake.
cmd.pipeline_downloads_hint: Ej tōl laḷḷọk ñan jaak in Daunlot ko
cmd.pipeline_fix_again: Kōṃṃan bar juon iien kōkmanman accessibility
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_done: Ej kōṃṃan bar juon iien remediation…
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Bar juon iien remediation ñan kotak score eo ḷapḷọk
cmd.pipeline_issues: Riit apañ ko rej pād wōt
cmd.pipeline_issues_hint: Ej kōnono kake apañ ko reḷap rej pād wōt
cmd.pipeline_issues_more2: bar jet ilo panel in Apañ ko.
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: Jaak in eo ejjab pād ioon screen kiiō.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc: Jino bar kōn juon peba ekāāl
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Emōj jeorḷọk — kotak juon peba ekāāl ñan jino.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Jeorḷọk tōprak in im kotak juon file ekāāl
cmd.pipeline_score: Ta score in accessibility eo aō?
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Bōjrak ālikin iien in — ej kōjparok men eo eṃōj
cmd.pipeline_tour_done: Ej jino tūr in tōprak ko.
cmd.pipeline_tour_hint: Juon tūr 60-jekōn kōn tōprak in remediation
cmd.pipeline_verification_hint: Ej tōl laḷḷọk ñan jaak in Verification
cmd.read_this_page_done: Ri-riit peij emōj kapeḷḷọk — kāālōt ia eo ñan jino ie.
cmd.submit_work_hint: Jilkinḷọk jerbal eo aṃ ñan ri-kaki eo aṃ
cmd.switch_theme_done: Theme emōj ukōt — ej ukōt meram, innām marok, innām high contrast.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Ej kapeḷḷọk kōnono in kile cloud-sync — kile ijeṇ ñan kebooje.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Sync jerbal eo aṃ ñan cloud (ej kajjitōk kile ilo iien eo ṃokta)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Ukōt juon kōḷọk emera ioon peij
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_hint: Kōmarok aolep men ijello̧kun men ko ijin
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Help mode emōj ukōt — klik jabdewōt control ñan katak kake.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Klik jabdewōt ñan katak ta eo ej kōṃṃane
cmd.toggle_line_focus_hint: Kameramḷọk juon lain ilo juon iien
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Juon lain ej eṃṃakūt ñan ḷoor
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_done: Jipañ ko rej alikkar emōj ukōt.
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_hint: Pija ko ej jipañ ippān jeje eo
cmd.translate_document_done: Emōj likūt kajin in ukōt ñan
cmd.translate_document_done2: im kameramḷọk batōn eo — kalbwin Ukōt ñan kōṃṃane. (Ukōt ej kōjerbal AI quota, kōn men in klik eo ej aṃ wōt.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Ej teiñi kajin eo ṃokta im jitōñ batōn eo
cmd.translate_document_pick: Emōj kameramḷọk kein ukōt ko — kāālōt juon kajin im kalbwin Ukōt.
cmd.undo_settings: Kōjepḷaak ukōt in settings eo āliktata aō
cmd.undo_settings_done: Emōj kōjepḷaak settings ko ṃokta (eḷaññe ear wōr juon ukōt ñan kōjepḷaake).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Kōjepḷaak settings in katak ko ṃokta (jab men ko eṃōj kōṃṃani)
cmd.voice_start_done: Kein kōllaajrak kōn ainikien epeḷḷọk. Ba juon command āinwōt “leta eḷapḷọk” ak “kapeḷḷọk educator hub”. Ba “bōjrak roñjake” ñan kaṃōjḷọk.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot ej roñjake command ko ṃae iien aṃ kabōjrak e
cmd.voice_stop_done: Kein kōllaajrak kōn ainikien epenjak — eṃōj kōtḷọk microphone eo.
cmd.zen_on_done: Zen mode epeḷḷọk — kalbwin Ctrl+K im kōṃṃan “exit zen” ñan jepḷaaktok.
cmd.zen_on_hint: Ṇooj aolep men ijello̧kun men ko ijin
palette.confirm: ⚠ Kalbwin Enter bar juon alen ñan kile
palette.footer: Aolep jerbal rej kwaḷọk. Ctrl+K ej ukōt.
palette.no_match: Ejjeḷọk command ejjet. Chat in bot eo (im ṃōttan iien ainikien) ej meḷeḷe kajjitōk ko reanemkwōj.
palette.placeholder: Taip juon command — “leta eḷapḷọk”, “educator hub”, “riit peij in”…
